name: libdbd-pg-perl
title: libdbd-pg-perl
summary: Perl DBI driver for the PostgreSQL database server
description:
Perl DBI driver for the PostgreSQL database server
DBD::Pg is a Perl DBI Database Driver module that works with the DBI module to
provide access to PostgreSQL databases. It enables you to control a PostgreSQL
database in a Perl script.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libdbd-pg-perl because Perl DBI driver for the PostgreSQL database server.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libdbd-pg-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libdbd-pg-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libdbd-pg-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
